text:
Togashi (トガシ, Togashi), the author of Hunter × Hunter, makes a couple of cameo appearances in the 1999 anime adaptation. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 42 (1999) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 50 (1999) 

Appearance

Togashi is often seen wearing the mask of a dog with its tongue sticking out and wears square glasses. He has long black hair. 

Personality

Togashi is known to be a pundit on how the Heavens Arena referee judge matches through their own scoring style, though his knowledge is seen to be overbearing with a lady commentator. 

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

During the match between Gon and Hisoka, he sits next to the lady commentator of Heavens Arena and explains to her how each individual referee judges the matches through their own personal scoring style. The commentator understands, though when she inquires as to who Togashi is, he refuses to answer. 

As Togashi explains the origin of Hisoka's Bungee Gum Nen ability, the commentator becomes annoyed by his know-it-all manner and has him removed. 

Yorknew City arc

Togashi makes another new appearance after Gon and Killua get scammed at an auction site, giving the audience advice to not judge an item by just looking at its picture, especially if it's something expensive. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

His role as a commentator was taken by Baka Ki El Dogra in the 2011 anime adaptation, who explains how the referees distribute points Hunter × Hunter - Episode 36 (2011) rather than the origin of Hisoka's Bungee Gum.
